registry.principle: External sources are ingested into one normalized master database before any model or dashboard reads them.

sportsdataverse.role: Primary schedule, team, season, and historical game source

nba_api.role: Primary official/advanced player and team stat API when available

boxscore_warehouse.role: Owned historical player game log fallback and long-term source of truth

odds_pipeline.role: Primary live odds, player props, line shopping, and sportsbook consensus

litellm.role: Optional AI gateway for future coach/reasoning model portability

optuna.role: Optional model tuning and threshold optimization, not a data source

registry.deprecated_pattern: Raw source files and experimental engines should not feed the dashboard directly. They feed master builder or remain legacy.

stats_quality.note: Stats are trusted only when live_players and recent5_rows are populated. Otherwise projections should lean more on market odds and be labeled degraded.

raw_status.notes: Loaded from existing current odds file.
raw_status.api_usage_policy: The Odds API is optional/manual only to conserve credits.

health.label: Team odds loaded

source_status.notes: Loaded from existing current odds file.
source_status.api_usage_policy: The Odds API is optional/manual only to conserve credits.

health.dashboard_note: Do not treat missing team spreads/totals as a full odds failure when player prop markets are loaded.
health.next_fix: Add manual/team odds or a reliable sportsbook feed for spreads and totals; continue using prop markets for player decisions.

odds_api.label: The Odds API
odds_api.detail: Disabled by default to conserve credits.

source_matrix.detail: Primary active slate schedule from data/wnba/scores.json.
Advanced stats falls back to owned boxscore warehouse.
wnba_players_live.json generated from official stats or boxscore fallback.
sportsbook consensus markets normalized into master props.
Do not use as primary because credits burn quickly.
AI gateway planned; not required for current dashboard.
Model tuning planned; not required for current dashboard.
